name: Vizi Wash Z37
comment: The Vizi Wash Z37 is a 740W professional moving head wash fixture with variable motorized zoom (10 ~ 60-degrees) and thirty-seven 20W Quad (RGBW / 4-IN-1) LEDs.

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast
Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast
